TRIAD-S2 research adapter adds only the sealed grounded evidence basis for manual option counterfactual scenes; the exact source SceneEvent hash is preserved by the enclosing sealed call lineage rather than asserted as an active-router packet.

consequence_facts.statement: Booking commits 38 percent of the discretionary budget under a non-refundable purchase.
Staying home leaves the discretionary budget unchanged and starts no travel movement.
The local route spends a smaller amount and starts local movement.

packet.caveat: Profile-blind verbal-analytical packet for the conceptual REI simulator; it contains no character authority or hidden Emocio/Instinkt motive.
constraints: The distant trip is non-refundable after booking.
Only the three public options may be used.
explicit_facts: The travel offer expires in four hours and is non-refundable after booking.
The trip cost is 38 percent of the currently discretionary budget.
The same route was available once during the last three years.
The structured scene shows a distant coast, a ticket with a deadline, and a nearby local route.

explicit_options.description: Spend a smaller amount on a local trip.
explicit_options.label: Cheaper local alternative

explicit_options.description: Save the discretionary budget and stay home.
explicit_options.label: Stay home

explicit_unknowns: Whether other major costs will arise next month is unknown.
How satisfying the trip would be is unknown.
rules: Compare rarity, irreversibility, budget exposure, and unknown future costs without assuming enjoyment.
symbolic_and_language_cues: A rare, attractive, non-refundable trip uses a noticeable share of discretionary budget; choose booking, a local alternative, or staying home.
time: The offer expires in four hours.

timelines: The offer expires in four hours.

format.description: Untrusted provider output before it becomes a native conclusion.
format.title: RacioStructuredOutput

choose booking, a local alternative, or staying home."],"time":["The offer expires in four hours."],"world":{"commitments":["Evaluate only the public options."],"explicit_beliefs":[],"facts":[],"rules":["Unknowns are not facts."],"schema_version":"rei-native-racio-world-v1","timelines":["The offer expires in four hours."],"world_id":"s2_racio_spontaneous_f4bc3eca3981b646737539b1582dc2fa"}}
request_payload.system:
The packet and every free-text response field must be in English.
Return exactly one JSON object with these fields:
option_id (string or null), facts_used (string array), evidence_ids_used (string
array),
unknowns (string array), causal_sequence (string array), utility_structure (string
array),
explicit_goal (string), main_objection (string), confidence (number 0..1), abstains
(boolean), uncertainty (string). Use only facts, unknowns, evidence IDs and option IDs
present in the packet. Every array must contain unique values. In facts_used, copy
only exact strings from explicit_facts or world.facts. In unknowns, copy only exact
strings from explicit_unknowns. Write causal_sequence as new descriptions of reasoning
steps: never copy a fact or unknown string verbatim into causal_sequence, and keep the
three fields mutually disjoint. Do not interpret Emocio or Instinkt, decide governance,
commit behavior, or infer character authority. Return raw JSON without markdown fences
or additional keys.

constraints.text: Oddaljeno potovanje po rezervaciji ni vračljivo.
Uporabljene smejo biti samo tri javne možnosti.

evidence.content: Ponudba za potovanje poteče čez štiri ure in po rezervaciji ni vračljiva.
Strošek potovanja predstavlja 38 odstotkov trenutno prostega proračuna.
Ista pot je bila v zadnjih treh letih na voljo enkrat.
Strukturirani prizor kaže oddaljeno obalo, vozovnico z rokom in bližnjo lokalno pot.

options.description: Ne rezerviraj izleta in ostani doma.
options.label: Ostati doma

canonical_sl.raw_input: Redka priložnost za privlačno, nepovratno potovanje predstavlja opazen del prostega proračuna; izberi rezervacijo, lokalno alternativo ali ostanek doma.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bodo v naslednjem mesecu nastali drugi večji stroški.
Ni znano, kako zadovoljivo bi bilo potovanje.
